languages.original_text: {n}Poison begins to drip from the Necron's words.{/n} "Needless to say, I will be keeping Laria Voigtvir — she has performed her role diligently, and I see no reason to discard her. If Seberian wishes to be reunited with her, he can return, beg for forgiveness, and... perhaps earn the privilege of rejoining my collection. As for you, pest..." {n}Trazyn raises his staff slightly.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Голос некрона окрашивается ядовитыми нотками.{/n} "Конечно же, Ларию Войгтвир я оставлю — она прилежно исполняла свою роль и я не вижу причин избавляться от нее. Если Себериан захочет с ней воссоединиться — он может вернуться, взмолиться о прощении... и, быть может, заслужить честь снова стать экспонатом. А что касается тебя, вредитель{mf||ница}..." {n}Тразин чуть поднимает посох.{/n}

{n}Poison begins to drip from the Necron's words.{/n} "Needless to say, I will be keeping Laria Voigtvir — she has performed her role diligently, and I see no reason to discard her. If Seberian wishes to be reunited with her, he can return, beg for forgiveness, and... perhaps earn the privilege of rejoining my collection. As for you, pest..." {n}Trazyn raises his staff slightly.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ネクロンの言葉から毒が滴り落ちる。{/n}「言うまでもなく、私はラリア・ヴォイストヴィルを留めておく。彼女は任務を忠実に遂行し、罰を受けるに値しない。もしセベリアンが彼女と再会したいのなら、彼は戻って許しを請い、…そして、私のコレクションに復帰する権利を得るかもしれない。だがお前には…」{n}トラザインは杖を少し持ち上げる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Poison begins to drip from the Necron's words.{/n} "Needless to say, I will be keeping Laria Voigtvir — she has performed her role diligently and warrants no punishment. If Seberian wishes to be reunited with her, he can return, beg for forgiveness, and... perhaps earn the right to rejoin my collection. As for you, pest..." {n}Trazyn raises his staff slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ネクロンの言葉から毒が滴り落ちる。「言うまでもなく、私はラリア・ヴォイストヴィルを留めておく。彼女は任務を忠実に遂行し、罰を受けるに値しない。もしセベリアンが彼女と再会したいのなら、彼は戻って許しを請い、…そして、私のコレクションに復帰する権利を得るかもしれない。だがお前には…」{n}トラズンは杖を少し持ち上げる。

languages.text: {n}恶意从太空死灵的话语间渗出。{/n}“可有一点无需多言，菈丽雅·维特威尔必须留下——她一直尽职尽责地扮演自己的角色，不该被遗弃。如果塞贝里安想和她重聚，那他可以回来，跪求宽恕……说不定还能重新获准列入我的收藏。至于你，小害虫……”{n}特拉金微微举起了权杖。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Poison begins to drip from the Necron's words.{/n} "Needless to say, I will be keeping Laria Voigtvir — she has performed her role diligently, and I see no reason to discard her. If Seberian wishes to be reunited with her, he can return, beg for forgiveness, and... perhaps earn the privilege of rejoining my collection. As for you, pest..." {n}Trazyn raises his staff slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}恶意从太空死灵的话语间渗出。{/n}“可有一点无需多言，菈丽雅·维特威尔必须留下——她一直尽职尽责地扮演自己的角色，不该被遗弃。如果塞贝里安想和她重聚，那他可以回来，跪求宽恕……说不定还能重新获准列入我的收藏。至于你，小害虫……”{n}特拉金微微举起了权杖。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las palabras del Necrón están cargadas de veneno.{/n} «Huelga decir que conservaré a Laria Voigtvir; ella ha cumplido su papel con diligencia y no veo motivos para desecharla. Si Seberian desea reencontrarse con ella, puede volver, suplicar perdón y... tal vez incluso se gane el privilegio de volver a unirse a mi colección. En cuanto a ti, alimaña...». {n}Trazyn alza levemente su báculo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Poison begins to drip from the Necron's words.{/n} "Needless to say, I will be keeping Laria Voigtvir — she has performed her role diligently, and I see no reason to discard her. If Seberian wishes to be reunited with her, he can return, beg for forgiveness, and... perhaps earn the privilege of rejoining my collection. As for you, pest..." {n}Trazyn raises his staff slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las palabras del Necrón están cargadas de veneno.{/n} «Huelga decir que conservaré a Laria Voigtvir; ella ha cumplido su papel con diligencia y no veo motivos para desecharla. Si Seberian desea reencontrarse con ella, puede volver, suplicar perdón y... tal vez incluso se gane el privilegio de volver a unirse a mi colección. En cuanto a ti, alimaña...». {n}Trazyn alza levemente su báculo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Worte des Necrons triefen vor Gift.{/n} "Es versteht sich von selbst, dass ich Laria Voigtvir behalten werde — sie hat ihre Rolle artig gespielt und ich sehe keinen Grund, mich ihrer zu entledigen. Falls Seberian sie wiedersehen möchte, kann er gerne um Vergebung winseln, dann ... gewähre ich ihm vielleicht das Privileg, in meine Sammlung zurückzukehren. Was dich angeht, Ungeziefer ..." {n}Trazyn hebt seinen Stab.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Poison begins to drip from the Necron's words.{/n} "Needless to say, I will be keeping Laria Voigtvir — she has performed her role diligently, and I see no reason to discard her. If Seberian wishes to be reunited with her, he can return, beg for forgiveness, and... perhaps earn the privilege of rejoining my collection. As for you, pest..." {n}Trazyn raises his staff slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Worte des Necrons triefen vor Gift.{/n} "Es versteht sich von selbst, dass ich Laria Voigtvir behalten werde — sie hat ihre Rolle artig gespielt und ich sehe keinen Grund, mich ihrer zu entledigen. Falls Seberian sie wiedersehen möchte, kann er gerne um Vergebung winseln, dann ... gewähre ich ihm vielleicht das Privileg, in meine Sammlung zurückzukehren. Was dich angeht, Ungeziefer ..." {n}Trazyn hebt seinen Stab.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les paroles du Nécron se font venimeuses.{/n} « Il va sans dire que je garde Laria Voigtvir, qui a joué son rôle admirablement et ne mérite donc pas de finir au rebut. Si Seberian souhaite être réuni avec elle, libre à lui de revenir et d'implorer mon pardon. Alors, peut-être gagnera-t-il le privilège de regagner ma collection. Quant à vous, vermine... » {n}Trazyn lève légèrement son bâton.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Poison begins to drip from the Necron's words.{/n} "Needless to say, I will be keeping Laria Voigtvir — she has performed her role diligently, and I see no reason to discard her. If Seberian wishes to be reunited with her, he can return, beg for forgiveness, and... perhaps earn the privilege of rejoining my collection. As for you, pest..." {n}Trazyn raises his staff slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les paroles du Nécron se font venimeuses.{/n} « Il va sans dire que je garde Laria Voigtvir, qui a joué son rôle admirablement et ne mérite donc pas de finir au rebut. Si Seberian souhaite être réuni avec elle, libre à lui de revenir et d'implorer mon pardon. Alors, peut-être gagnera-t-il le privilège de regagner ma collection. Quant à vous, vermine... » {n}Trazyn lève légèrement son bâton.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nekron'un sözlerinden zehir damlamaya başlıyor.{/n} "Laria Voigtvir bende kalacak. Rolünü özenle yerine getirdi. Ondan kurtulmak için sebebim yok. Seberian onunla yeniden bir araya gelmek isterse dönebilir, af dileyebilir ve... Belki de koleksiyonuma yeniden katılma ayrıcalığını kazanabilir. Sana gelince böcek..." {n}Trazyn, asasını hafifçe kaldırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Poison begins to drip from the Necron's words.{/n} "Needless to say, I will be keeping Laria Voigtvir — she has performed her role diligently, and I see no reason to discard her. If Seberian wishes to be reunited with her, he can return, beg for forgiveness, and... perhaps earn the privilege of rejoining my collection. As for you, pest..." {n}Trazyn raises his staff slightly.{/n}
